notes: Solid Tetris implementation with ghost piece, DAS, wall kicks, and audio, but the drop timer logic has a bug where lockTimer only increments when dropTimer already exceeded interval causing inconsistent locking, and the gravity drop resets dropTimer only on successful drop leaving it accumulating incorrectly.
Excellent implementation with DAS, ghost piece, and wall kicks, but soft drop (ArrowDown) cannot be held due to e.repeat being blocked without a custom timer.

Core Tetris loop is mostly present with spawning, rotation, line clears, scoring, next piece and ghost piece, but controls are incomplete/awkward (no soft-drop repeat, simplistic kicks, no hold/pause) and lock/gravity timing makes play feel rough rather than polished.
